title: `decompose-apply` emits `confidence: draft` on all created nodes
definition_of_done: All nodes created by decompose-apply have confidence=draft; they do not appear in trls ready until dag-summary sign-off; dogfood test passes; make check green
outcome: decompose-apply now emits confidence=draft on all created nodes; draft nodes excluded from trls ready until dag-transition promotes them; integration test confirms full round-trip; make check green

notes.msg: Implemented confidence=draft on all nodes created by decompose-apply. TDD: wrote failing integration test (TestDecomposeApply_DraftConfidence) and unit test (TestApplyPlan_EmitsDraftConfidence) first, then added Confidence: "draft" to Payload in internal/decompose/apply.go. make check green: 0 lint issues, all tests pass, mutation testing 100% efficacy.
